What We Do

Full-Service Junk Removal

From cluttered garages to construction debris — our crew shows up, loads up, and cleans up. You don't lift a finger.

🏠

Residential Cleanouts

Basement, garage, attic, or full-house cleanout — we clear the space so you can breathe again. Efficient, respectful, and thorough.

🏢

Commercial Removal

Office furniture, equipment, renovation debris — we keep your business running without the clutter. Flexible scheduling, zero disruption.

🛋️

Furniture & Appliances

Couches, fridges, mattresses, washers — we handle the heavy lifting so you don't have to. Properly disposed or donated when possible.

🏗️

Construction & Reno Debris

Drywall, lumber, tiles, fixtures — post-reno chaos is our specialty. We haul it all away and leave the site clean.

🌿

Yard & Natural Waste

Branches, stumps, sod, and landscaping debris — we handle it all. Note: a $50 surcharge applies for natural/organic material loads.

⚡

Rapid Response

When you need it gone fast, we move fast. Our three-truck fleet means we can respond quickly and get to you without the long wait.

Transparent Pricing

No Surprises.
Just Clean Spaces.

We price by load volume — you only pay for the space you use. Prices shown are starting estimates; your final quote is always confirmed before we begin.

All pricing includes labour, loading, transport, and disposal fees. The prices listed are approximate starting points — not fixed rates. Final cost depends on the complexity of the job. Some loads require extra labour or power tools to disassemble large, awkward, or built-in items before they can be hauled out. That additional work is reflected in the final price, which we'll always discuss with you upfront before anything gets started.

* All prices are approximate starting points. Final cost may vary based on job complexity — see note below.

Minimum Load
$75+
A few small items or a single large piece. Perfect for quick single-item pickups.
Quarter Load
$150+
About ¼ of a truck bed. Great for a few furniture pieces or a small garage clear-out.
Half Load
$250+
Our most popular option. Covers most medium cleanouts and renovation debris hauls.
Three-Quarter
$350+
Big jobs, big space. Ideal for larger estate or commercial cleanouts.
Full Load
$450+
Maximum capacity — one full truck, one flat rate. The best value for large-scale removal.

🌿 Natural Material Surcharge

A flat $50 additional fee applies to loads containing natural or organic materials — branches, stumps, sod, dirt, and similar yard waste — due to specialized disposal requirements.

📍 Distance Fee

Jobs outside our primary service area may incur a travel surcharge. We'll always tell you upfront — no surprise charges on the day. See our Coverage section for zone details.

🔧 Labour & Complexity

Some jobs require more than just hauling — if items need to be disassembled using power tools (built-in shelving, large furniture, bulky structures), or if access is difficult, the added labour time will be reflected in the final price. We'll always walk you through it before we start.

📞 Free Estimates

Not sure what tier you need? Call us at 438-364-5859 or send us a photo by email and we'll give you an honest, no-obligation quote within the hour.

Our Fleet

Three Trucks. Always Ready.

Our well-maintained fleet means faster turnaround, bigger capacity, and the ability to handle multiple jobs without making you wait.

Truck 1

2010 Honda Ridgeline

Navy Blue

Our nimble everyday workhorse. Perfect for residential pickups and tight urban spaces where larger trucks can't maneuver.

Truck 2

2011 GMC Sierra

Bright Yellow

Hard to miss and built to haul. Our Sierra tackles mid-size loads with ease and is ready for any residential or commercial job.

Heavy Duty

2008 Chevy Silverado 2500

Black · Dually · Turbo Diesel

The beast of our fleet. Our heavy-duty dually diesel handles the biggest, heaviest loads — construction debris, full estate cleanouts, and everything in between.

Distance Fees

Beyond Our Zone?
We Still Show Up.

For jobs outside our primary service area, a modest travel fee applies. We believe in transparency — you'll know the total cost before we arrive.

📍 Travel Surcharges

Primary Zone (up to 30 km) No charge
30–60 km from base +$25
60–100 km from base +$50
100+ km from base Call for quote
🌿
Natural Material Fee — +$50 Branches, stumps, sod, dirt, and organic yard waste require special disposal. A $50 flat surcharge applies to any load containing natural materials.

Our Work

Our Work Speaks For Itself.

Every job we take on gets the same treatment: fast, clean, and complete. Take a look at what we've tackled.

Our Story

Built on Friendship.
Driven by Community.

"

We've known each other since we were four years old. Grew up in the same neighbourhood, caused the same amount of trouble, and always talked about doing something together. When we saw how hard it was for people around us to get rid of junk — without paying a fortune or waiting weeks — the idea clicked. Waste Away Services was born out of a simple belief: your community deserves reliable, honest, hard-working people who show up and get the job done. That's us.

— Nick & Taige, Co-Founders

The Founders

Nick Bourgeois

Co-Founder & Operator

Co-founder and operator of Waste Away Services. Nick brings the hustle, the vision, and the hands-on work ethic that keeps every job running smooth.

Taige Soneji

Co-Founder & Operator

Co-founder and operator alongside Nick. Taige brings the same drive, the same standards, and the same commitment to making sure every client is taken care of.

The Crew

Luke Norby

Lead Field Technician

Reliable, hardworking, and always first on site. Luke gets the job done efficiently and leaves every property cleaner than he found it.

Mack Delorme

Lead Field Technician

Strong, skilled, and ready for anything. Mack handles the toughest loads and most complex disassembly jobs without breaking a sweat.

Simple Process

How It Works

Getting rid of your junk is easier than you think. Three steps and it's done — no hassle, no surprises.

📞
Step 1

Call or Text Us

Reach out by phone or email. Describe what you've got and we'll give you a straight, honest quote — no obligation, no runaround.

🚛
Step 2

We Show Up

We arrive on time with the right truck for the job. Our crew handles all the heavy lifting, loading, and any disassembly needed — you don't lift a finger.

✅
Step 3

It's Gone

We haul everything away and leave the space clean. Proper disposal, no shortcuts. You get your property back — exactly how you imagined it.
